title: Water quantity - Canada.ca
content:
Water levels, floods, hydrometric data, water availability, Water Survey of Canada.

## Services and information

### Water Survey of Canada
Hydrometric data, hydrology of Canada, hydrometric program, international activities.

### Great Lakes water levels
Current, recent and historical levels, forecasts, precipitation, waves, wind, ice cover, outflows.

### Water environmental sustainability indicators
Quantity, availability, quality, phosphorus, nutrients, land use impact, harmful substances.
Causes and costs of flooding, reducing flood damage, flooding events in Canada.
